{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Silverscale Iron body
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Silverscale Iron body]] is a technique common for fishermen that fortifies spirit control and provides resistance to spiritual attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Silverscale Iron body]] is a type of body or defense possessed by [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
